Reviews.Author: xrl1kvmw7
Reviews.Comment: Melatonin is probably the best external I've ever used thanks to the custom luau environment they have

Categories.Comment: Well the Aimbot supports both Mouse,Camera and Silent aswell so I can say that it doesn't lack any features regarding aimbot either. You can both closet- and rage cheat with melatonin as it has speed configuration for the aimbot
Absolutely awesome. Supports both low-end and high-end pcs so your stuff doesn't lag
Easy to navigate and not really obstructing or confusing in any way.
Melatonin is never down and if it is you get compensated like twice the amount
It does have quite a ton of features regarding things such as Custom Fog, Fullbright, Ambient Lighting. But a desync would be neat too!

Reviews.Author: o1drk69ql
Reviews.Comment: as of December 2025, Melatonin is pretty good, but it can still be much better. Hopefully will be much better when the recode releases.

Categories.Comment: Melatonin is pretty good if you use it for legit cheating, as for rage, I would instead recommend other externals as this was not really built for rage cheating. I've been using Melatonin for around a year now and it is very good if you plan to closet.
The visuals are simple, yet look great. There's not much special things in visuals, only thing i can think of are the chams.
UI is very easy to navigate and you can find everything in the cheat easily
Melatonin is very stable, I barely have crashes. As for it being up, the developer works on multiple cheats at once so it may take a little longer to update than other externals.
The essentials are there (Aimbot, ESP, and some movement modules) but there's not much other features. The features that are in the cheat are very polished and I have never had issues with them.

Reviews.Comment: this cheat overall good but u need invite for it + needs some features which will be added in recode will make it perfect

Categories.Comment: It's perfect aimbot and getting worked on recently it will be way more perfect.

i mean it's easy to use not complicated

missing some features but will  be added in future update i believe
